title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 417.433 - Report in writing to be delivered quarterly to customer — content
text:
417.433.  Report in writing to be delivered quarterly to customer — content. — For each contract for invention development services, the invention developer, at least once each calendar quarter during the term of the contract, shall deliver to the customer at the address specified in the contract a written report that identifies the contract and that sets forth:
  (1)  A full, clear, and concise description of the services performed to the date of the report and of the services to be performed; and
  (2)  The name and address of each person, firm, or corporation, to whom the subject matter of the contract has been disclosed, the reason for each disclosure, the nature of the disclosure, and copies of all responses received as a result of those disclosures.
(L. 1995 S.B. 80 & 88)
